full_text:
Yan Rou 閻柔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Rou (閻柔)was born in Guangyang. Lived among the tribes as a child. Campaigned with Cao Cao against the Wuwan. Yan Rou was affiliated with Liu Yu, Yuan Shao, and the Wei Kingdom.
